delta_perturbation_descriptions.axis_fwh: reinterpret flattened tokens as F x W x H instead of F x H x W
delta_perturbation_descriptions.axis_hfw: reinterpret flattened tokens as H x F x W instead of F x H x W
delta_perturbation_descriptions.axis_whf: reinterpret flattened tokens as W x H x F instead of F x H x W
delta_perturbation_descriptions.random_coord: assign deterministic random F x H x W coordinates to token positions
delta_perturbation_descriptions.reverse_coord: assign reversed F x H x W coordinates to token positions

random_coord.description: assign deterministic random F x H x W coordinates to token positions

reverse_coord.description: assign reversed F x H x W coordinates to token positions
